tasks.description: 1.1 Initialize Next.js application in an `app-frontend` (or similar) directory
1.2 Configure Tailwind CSS, Jest (for TDD), and React Query
1.3 Scaffold the FastAPI backend application structure in `app-backend`
2.1 Refactor existing database connection and query logic (from `app/db.py`) to work with FastAPI
2.2 Implement robust CSV upload and parsing endpoint (`/api/upload`)
2.3 Implement Hybrid Categorization engine (keyword matching + NLP fallback)
2.4 Build endpoints for Dashboard metrics (KPIs, Cashflow evolution, Category breakdown)
2.5 Build specifically formatted endpoint for strict unidirectional Sankey diagram data
3.1 Design and build the main Shell Layout (Sidebar, Header, Dark Mode theme)
3.2 Implement Top Metrics cards (Total Balance, Income, Expenses, Savings Goal)
3.3 Integrate charting library (e.g., Recharts) for Income vs Expenses area chart
3.4 Integrate charting library for Spending Categories donut chart
3.5 Build the Recent Transactions list component with drag-and-drop upload zone
4.1 Implement the Sankey Diagram component
4.2 Develop Budget Tracking interface (Set targets, view progress) and corresponding API routes
4.3 Develop Subscription Tracking interface (Identify recurring charges) and corresponding API routes
5.1 Write Jest unit tests for critical frontend components and utility functions
5.2 Write Pytest tests for the FastAPI backend logic
5.3 Final aesthetic polish (Tailwind micro-animations, loading states, error handling)
5.4 Safely remove legacy Streamlit UI code (`app/ui/`)

instruction:
Read context files, work through pending tasks, mark complete as you go.
Pause if you hit blockers or need clarification.
